mapper.select: SELECT id, name FROM dish_category ORDER BY id

SELECT id, cat_id AS catId, name, price, stock, picture, description, d.is_deleted AS isDeleted, COALESCE(s.soldCount, 0) AS soldCount FROM dish d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.dish_id, SUM(oi.count) AS soldCount FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.pay_status = 1 GROUP BY oi.dish_id ) s ON s.dish_id = d.id WHERE d.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dish ( cat_id, name, price, stock, picture, description, is_deleted )
VALUES ( #{catId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{picture}, #{description}, 0 )
